parameters.command:
set -e
NOW="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
echo "MEMORY_AUDIT_START"
echo "checked_at=$NOW"
echo "--- MEMORY FILES ---"
find /root/.openclaw/workspace/memory -maxdepth 1 -type f | sort 2>/dev/null || true
echo "--- MEMORY HEADS ---"
for f in /root/.openclaw/workspace/memory/*.md; do [ -e "$f" ] || continue; echo "FILE:$f"; sed -n '1,20p' "$f"; done
